# CWE-497 positive: diagnostics leak host environment (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-497-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"runtime"
)

func RegisterHostDiagnostics() {
	http.HandleFunc("/diag/host", func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		host, _ := os.Hostname()
		_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]any{
			"hostname": host,
			"env":      os.Environ(),
			"cpus":     runtime.NumCPU(),
			"goos":     runtime.GOOS,
		})
	})
}
